title: deep-work session-receipt payload v1.0
description: Authoritative payload schema for deep-work session-receipt envelope (artifact_kind=session-receipt, schema.version=1.0). Mirrors the session-receipt payload emitted by deep-work `deep-finish` at the pinned SHA; top-level fields are closed (additionalProperties:false) with an `x-` forward-compat namespace. parent_run_id chains to upstream deep-evolve evolve-insights when the session consumed evolve outputs in its research phase.

schema_version.description: Payload-internal schema version (independent from envelope schema_version).

canonical.description: True when this receipt is the canonical session-level aggregate (not a slice or replay).

derived_from.description: Glob or path describing what the receipt was synthesized from (e.g., 'receipts/SLICE-*.json').

phase.description: Current/last phase reached (e.g., brainstorm, research, plan, implement, test, integrate).

outcome_ref.description: Optional reference (PR URL, commit SHA, branch) tied to the outcome.

total_estimated_cost.description: Estimated session cost in USD; null when the runtime cannot estimate it.

quality_gates.description: Named quality gates and their PASS/FAIL verdicts.

quality_diagnostics.description: Informational diagnostic metrics appended in deep-finish Step 2-1 (not part of the core quality score).
